package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for three_index_slice_for_append_safety: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `sub := original[a:b]` followed by `sub = append(sub, ...)` with no capacity bound
type CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyModel
}

type CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyService struct {
    repo *CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafety(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyDTO) error {
    focus := "three_index_slice_for_append"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var copied []CaseThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafetyDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    three_index_slice_append_safety_positive := map[string]int{"three": 1, "index": 2, "slice": 3, "append": 4, "safety": 5}
    three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    three_positive_0 := three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["three"] + len(input)
    _ = three_positive_0
    index_positive_1 := three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["index"] + len(input)
    _ = index_positive_1
    slice_positive_2 := three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_positive_2
    append_positive_3 := three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_positive_3
    safety_positive_4 := three_index_slice_append_safety_positive["safety"] + len(input)
    _ = safety_positive_4
    return nil
}
